gaps.summary: The repository did not have one explicit booking-triage-notification contract tying handoff acceptance, patient status, dedupe, and deep-link entry together.
gaps.smallestSafeBridge: Publish BookingTriageNotificationIntegrationContract, state matrix, and validator off one deterministic 306 scenario seed.
gaps.followUpAction: Adopt the same contract markers if a broader shared notification hub later absorbs this seam.

gaps.summary: The browser proofs still use seeded patient and staff surface aliases for 306 booking cases while the production status seam is new.
gaps.smallestSafeBridge: Keep the 306 seed, validator, and Playwright markers pinned to the same booking-case IDs so any route drift breaks fast.
gaps.followUpAction: Replace the seeded aliases when both shells consume live status projections from the integrated route family.
